project_type: WordPress plugin (PHP + vanilla JS + CSS custom properties)
build_system: None - pure PHP plugin, no npm/composer. Zip packaging only.
test_framework: None - no automated tests. Validation is PHP syntax check only.
verification_instructions: 1. Run php -l on all PHP files to confirm no syntax errors. 2. Verify the zip is buildable.
snapshot_or_generated_files: zymarg-community-board-v{VERSION}.zip at repo root. Rebuild with: cd /projects/sandbox/Community-board && rm -f zymarg-community-board-v*.zip && zip -r zymarg-community-board-v{VERSION}.zip zymarg-community-board/
setup_instructions: No setup needed. PHP is available for syntax checking.
environment_constraints: No WordPress runtime available for functional testing. Validation limited to PHP lint. No Docker. Git commits use: git -c user.name="ZYMARG" -c user.email="dev@zymarg.com" commit
contribution_requirements: Version bump on every change (4 files: plugin header Version:, /VERSION, readme.txt Stable tag + changelog, /LATEST.md). Inner zip folder slug is stable 'zymarg-community-board/' (no version in folder name). Outer zip filename has version. All global functions must have function_exists() guards. uninstall.php must be non-destructive by default. ZYMARG brand colors: Primary #9500A5, Container #BD00D1, Accent #FEA9FF, Dark Purple Text #36003D.
key_patterns: Singleton pattern for all classes (private static $instance, public static instance()). Settings via ZCRB_Settings::instance()->get(). Bilingual strings in ZCRB_I18n with en/bn arrays. CSS uses custom properties prefixed --zcrb-. Post meta prefixed _zcrb_. Hook into plugins_loaded for bootstrap. Admin menu under CPT menu (edit.php?post_type=zcrb_request).
directory_structure: Root: VERSION, LATEST.md, README.md, zymarg-community-board/ (plugin source). Plugin: bootstrap PHP, includes/ (10 class files), assets/css/ + assets/js/, templates/, languages/, uninstall.php, readme.txt.
